Add setup and closeout automation commands

Add wk setup to persist profile/audience defaults and safe package scripts, and add wk closeout to create reviewable draft packets before validating and regenerating the wiki outputs.

Home / Decisions
DecisionFor everyone automationsetupcloseoutagents

Context

Wikiwiki needs a portable automation layer that works for non-AI users while giving agentic IDEs a deterministic closeout workflow.

Decision

Add wk setup to persist profile/audience defaults and safe package scripts, and add wk closeout to create reviewable draft packets before validating and regenerating the wiki outputs.

Consequences

Projects get a cross-machine adoption step and an objective-closeout command without hooks, watch mode, or automatic record mutation. Closeout drafts remain prompts until a user or agent deliberately applies them.

  • src/cli/commands/setup.ts
  • src/cli/commands/closeout.ts
